description: CFTC Deep View (R7). 5-layer COT analytics on top of cftc-all-cache: z-scores 1y+3y, position deltas, smart/dumb divergence, contrarian setups. Fridays 22 UTC after CFTC release. Outputs cftc-deep-view.json + cot-extremes.json.
